tool.name: Proseg
tool.description: probabilistic cell segmentation for spatial transcriptomics
tool.command:
## Link the input file ln -s '$transcripts' transcripts.csv &&
proseg
## ── PLATFORM PRESET ── #if $platform.preset == "xenium": --xenium #elif $platform.preset == "cosmx": --cosmx #elif $platform.preset == "cosmx_micron": --cosmx-micron #elif $platform.preset == "merscope": --merscope #elif $platform.preset == "manual": --x-column '${platform.x_col}' --y-column '${platform.y_col}' --z-column '${platform.z_col}' --gene-column '${platform.gene_col}' #end if
## ── PRIOR SEGMENTATION ── #if $cellpose_masks: --cellpose-masks '$cellpose_masks' #end if
## ── MORPHOLOGY PRESET ── #if $tissue_preset.mode == "annular": --cell-compactness 0.02 --enforce-connectivity #elif $tissue_preset.mode == "custom": --cell-compactness $tissue_preset.cell_compactness $tissue_preset.enforce_connectivity #else: --cell-compactness 0.04 #end if
## ── VOXEL GEOMETRY AND SAMPLING ── --voxel-size $voxel_size --burnin-voxel-size $burnin_voxel_size --voxel-layers $voxel_layers --samples $samples --burnin-samples $burnin_samples
## ── OPTIONAL FLAGS ── $ignore_z #if $min_qv: --qv-column qv --min-qv $min_qv #end if
## ── ADVANCED OPTIONS ── --morphology-steps-per-iter $advanced.morph_steps --ncomponents $advanced.ncomponents --diffusion-probability $advanced.diffusion_prob
## ── POLYGON OUTPUT (optional) ── #if $generate_polygons: --output-cell-polygons '$output_polygons_file' #end if
## ── MAIN OUTPUT ── ## Write to a temporary directory first --output-spatialdata 'out.zarr'
transcripts.csv &&
## Move contents to the directory path Galaxy expects mv out.zarr/* '$output_spatialdata' &&
## Write run summary echo "ProSeg run complete." > '$run_summary'

param.name: transcripts
param.label: Transcript CSV
param.help: CSV file with one row per detected transcript. Must contain x, y, z coordinates and gene name.

param.name: cellpose_masks
param.label: CellPose cell masks (.npy)
param.help: Prior segmentation required by ProSeg. Run CellPose on your DAPI image first.

param.name: preset
param.label: Platform preset
param.help: Select the preset matching your instrument.

tool.help:
**ProSeg** — Probabilistic Cell Segmentation for Spatial Transcriptomics
ProSeg uses a Cellular Potts Model (CPM) to refine initial cell boundaries using the spatial distribution of transcripts. It requires a prior segmentation (e.g., from CellPose on a DAPI image) to determine the number and approximate location of cells.
-----
**Workflow**
1. Run CellPose on your DAPI image to produce ``cellpose_masks.npy`` 2. Provide the transcript CSV and masks file to this tool 3. Select the platform preset matching your instrument 4. The output is a SpatialData Zarr directory.
-----
**Citation**
Moses et al. (2023) doi:10.1101/2023.11.20.567950
